name: Pass the Hash Activity 2
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Dave Kennedy, Jeff Warren (method) / David Vassallo (rule)
SIGMA Title: Pass the Hash Activity 2
SIGMA Description: Detects the attack technique pass the hash which is used to move laterally inside the network

False positives:
- Administrator activity

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID"=4624 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%s-1-0-0%' AND "Logon Type"=3 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ntlmssp%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%keylength%0%') OR ("Event ID"=4624 AND "Logon Type"=9 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%seclogo%')) AND (NOT("Target Username"='ANONYMOUS LOGON')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Pass the Hash Activity 2 on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID"=4624 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%s-1-0-0%' AND "Logon Type"=3 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ntlmssp%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%keylength%0%') OR ("Event ID"=4624 AND "Logon Type"=9 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%seclogo%')) AND (NOT("Target Username"='ANONYMOUS LOGON')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Pass the Hash Activity 2

Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
